unresolved.details: The 40 primary Prayer Bead locations now have source-backed mappings, 11 secondary ItemLotParam reward/replacement flags reconcile collected locations in S0000.sl2, and 14 locations are missing by verified item-lot/shop evidence. Offering Box replacement behavior is still not mapped as a general-purpose mechanic for other saves.

Rows 1700020, 1700030, and 1700040 are verified as the three Valley Prayer Bead pickup flags, but their exact row-to-location ordering among the Poison Pool statue-head pickup, Under-Shrine Valley pickup, and Gun Fort hidden pickup still needs EMEVD/coordinate verification.
